title: Mystic Mods
description: A polished Vanilla+ experience based on Vanilla Perfected by demonjoetv, with my own custom twists and improvements.
body:
# Mystic Mods

 **Version: 1.21.11**

This pack builds on the foundation of Vanilla Perfected, keeping the authentic vanilla Minecraft experience while refining it with performance improvements, visual polish, and essential quality-of-life features. On top of that, it includes a selection of custom mods chosen by me to add a bit of extra personality and utility.

## ✨ Features

### 🚀 Optimized Performance

Sodium, Lithium, FerriteCore, ImmediatelyFast, and more ensure smooth gameplay on any system.

### 🎨 Visual Enhancements

Improved animations, footsteps, capes, connected textures, and subtle graphical upgrades bring Minecraft to life without straying from vanilla.

### 🛠️ Better Building

Litematica, Armour Stand Arms, Axiom and similar tools for builders who want precise creative control.

### 🗺️ Exploration Ready

Xaero’s World Map, Dungeons & Taverns, and other tweaks expand exploration while staying true to the base game.

### 🎮 Quality of Life Upgrades

AppleSkin, Easy Shulker Boxes, Double Doors, and more small improvements that make survival smoother.

### 🎮 Extra Compatibility

ViaFabricPlus for cross-version play, Controlify for controller support, and utilities for advanced players.

### 🧩 Custom Additions

My personal mod choices layered on top of Vanilla Perfected for a unique twist.

## 🎯 Philosophy

At its core, this is still vanilla Minecraft, perfected — lightweight, optimized, and immersive. But with a few personal touches, this pack offers something a little more unique than the base Vanilla Perfected experience.


Credits:

Vanilla Tweaks: https://vanillatweaks.net/

Vanilla Perfected: https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected
